pull_request.title: automatic conversion from futurize --stage1 with small fixes
pull_request.body:
**Issue(s)**
This is a first step for Py3 migration #1083 

**Description**
This is the result of applying _Stage 1: “safe” fixes_ of `futurize`.
Probably the most interesting change in this commit is the use of `absolute_import`.
This caused problems with the mutual imports of `apiv2_utils.py` and `exceptions.py` which I fixed by using an absolute import.

I left out `solr451custom.py` and `solr451pysolr.py` to not cause merge problems with #1614 

**Deployment steps**:
None

commit_summaries.message:
automatic conversion from futurize --stage1 with small fixes

the most interesting change in this commit is the use of absolute_import
this caused problems with the mutual imports of apiv2_utils.py and exceptions.py which I fixed by using an absolute import

Fix import error in tagrec and similarity servers

Tag recommendation and similarity servers yield this error after changes in PR: ValueError: Attempted relative import in non-package

This is not cached in tests because these services are not run in our tests.
